meta.author: The Liturgy Of The Blessed Apostles

provenance.notes: Processed 3 quotes from 4 verse files. Source: HistoricalChristianFaith/Commentaries-Database. License: PUBLIC DOMAIN.

data.author: The Liturgy Of The Blessed Apostles
data.quote: And they respond:- May Christ listen to thy prayers, and be pleased with thy sacrifice, receive thy oblation, and honour thy priesthood, and grant unto us, through thy mediation,

data.author: The Liturgy Of The Blessed Apostles
data.quote: For He is the living and life-giving bread which cometh down from heaven, and giveth life to the whole world, of which they who eat die not; and they who receive it are saved by it, and do not see corruption, and live through it for ever; and Thou art the antidote of our mortality, and the resurrection of our entire frame.
data.source_title: The Liturgy of the Blessed Apostles

data.author: The Liturgy Of The Blessed Apostles
data.quote: Before the resplendent throne of Thy majesty, O Lord, and the exalted and sublime throne of Thy glory, and on the awful seat of the strength of Thy love and the propiatory altar which Thy will hath established, in the region of Thy pasture,
